description: Bundled zero-API-spend demo (FR-31 / 13a smoke). Three SHELL jobs, pool 2, each wraps a trivial command via the FR-40 wrap adapter -- the ENGINE runs them directly (no live agent, no real work); doneness is the child's exit code. Watch pool-limited dispatch (2 then 1), idle ticks, then a clean reap to `done`. Concretize each target_repo to a real dir before running (every real run substitutes absolute paths).

command: print('demo-a: stub work, zero API spend')
print('demo-b: stub work, zero API spend')
print('demo-c: stub work, zero API spend')
